dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7376 RH: Local Water Protection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Scholten (for herself and Mr. Mast) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure
Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Water Pollution Control Act to reauthorize certain programs relating to nonpoint source management, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Local Water Protection Act.

Section 319(j) of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act (33 U.S.C. 1329(j)) is amended by striking for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2027 and inserting for each of fiscal years 2027 through 2031.

endorsement.action-desc: Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed
